description: Azure + GCP cost management: spending, forecasts, anomalies, budgets, idle resources, and tags.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.alexpota/cloudscope

environmentVariables.description: Azure subscription ID to query for cost data. Optional; auto-detected from az login session if not set.
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID

environmentVariables.description: Azure tenant ID for service principal authentication. Optional; falls back to DefaultAzureCredential (e.g. az login) if unset.
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Service principal client ID. Optional; required only when using ClientSecretCredential.
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Service principal client secret. Optional; required only when using ClientSecretCredential.
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: GCP project ID. Recommended to set explicitly in the MCP client env block — may not be inherited from gcloud shell configuration.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: Fully-qualified BigQuery billing export table (project.dataset.table_name). Required for GCP cost queries.
environmentVariables.name: GCP_BILLING_TABLE

environmentVariables.description: GCP billing account ID (format: XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX). Optional; needed only for budget monitoring.
environmentVariables.name: GCP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to GCP service account JSON key file. Optional; falls back to Application Default Credentials (gcloud auth).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
